title: Regents recognize Mnookin’s service, contributions
summary_en: The Universities of Wisconsin Board of Regents recognized UW–Madison Chancellor Jennifer Mnookin for her leadership ahead of her upcoming departure for Columbia University.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学校董会通过决议表彰麦迪逊分校校长珍妮弗·姆努金任职贡献

title: The start of Terrace season
summary_en: After a long winter, the sunburst chairs are back on the Memorial Union Terrace.
title_cn: [待翻译] The start of Terrace season

title: A UW professor’s book tells the overlooked tale of a queer Black man who risked his life during WWII for love
summary_en: Ethelene Whitmire’s ‘The Remarkable Life of Reed Peggram,’ who survived and escaped a Nazi concentration camp with his lover, has received national recognition since its release.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校教授著作记述二战黑人性少数男子为爱涉险的被忽视经历
